title: 操作绑定
completionRule: Complete only when the source keyboard, mouse button/wheel/area/gesture, touch gesture and radial-menu controls are inventoried and migrated; context priority, search, conflicts, disable/reset, canonical persistence, legacy import and accessible equivalents are shared by GUI/CLI/TUI; gamepad is documented as an XR extension; inactive settings and devices perform zero work; and desktop/constrained-card/performance gates pass.

sourceUiInventory.title: 设置 Card 与统一面板
动作与上下文优先级
acceptanceItems: 同输入按活动上下文解析
面板/阅读器/编辑器/对话框模式

sourceUiInventory.title: XR 标准手柄扩展
acceptanceItems: 与其他设备共享动作/上下文

items.title: 共享动作 registry
items.targetContract: All legacy core and provider actions map to stable XR IDs; devices and radial slots reference the same catalog without embedding callbacks in persisted data.
items.notes: All 61 legacy core/provider actions plus two XR actions have stable IDs, labels, categories and legacy mappings. The shared executor currently closes page and adjacent-book navigation, zoom, rotation, page mode/direction, fullscreen, shell, file open/close, radial and slideshow surfaces; adjacent books reuse the atomic backend resolver and update the adopted path from canonical metadata. Video, destructive file, upscale, remaining viewer toggles, dynamic Card actions and CLI/TUI dispatch remain pending.

items.title: 按活动操作上下文解析绑定
items.targetContract: Global, reader, video, panel, editor and modal contexts have deterministic priority; editable/IME targets suppress Reader actions and the same input may map differently across contexts.
items.notes: The browser route derives editor/modal/panel/video/reader mode, maps legacy viewer/videoPlayer contexts without flattening them, suppresses global fallback in editor/modal contexts, and excludes interactive controls from pointer/gesture dispatch. CLI/TUI context-stack projection remains pending.

items.title: 键盘与修饰键绑定
items.targetContract: Dynamic keyboard bindings use a maintained hotkey engine, preserve physical codes/modifiers, ignore repeat/composition and remain disabled in incompatible contexts.
items.notes: react-hotkeys-hook owns runtime matching, key-down/key-up lifecycle and capture-phase chord recording. The editor exposes physical codes, modifiers and bounded hold timing; Enter hold opens the radial menu after 450 ms and key-up/blur/unmount cancel pending timers.

items.title: 鼠标按键绑定
items.targetContract: Left/middle/right/side buttons and click/double-click/press/hold variants resolve through the same action/context route without stealing unbound pointer input.
items.notes: Buttons 0..7 and click/double-click/press/hold descriptors are editable and routed outside interactive controls. @use-gesture owns pointer recording and configurable hold duration/movement cancellation; Browser pointer evidence remains pending.

items.title: 滚轮方向绑定
items.targetContract: Up/down wheel gestures and modifiers use the maintained gesture engine and prevent default only when a binding handles the event.
items.notes: @use-gesture/react owns runtime and recording; direction and all four modifiers are editable, and interactive controls are excluded. Modifier recording and runtime still require Browser E2E.

items.title: 九宫格区域点击
items.targetContract: Configurable viewport areas resolve clicks without coupling bindings to pixel coordinates.
items.notes: The shared bounded 3x3 geometry, visual selector and Reader pointer route support left/middle/right click, double-click and press with area precedence over generic mouse bindings. Desktop and 420x360 Chromium geometry remain pending.

items.title: 触控滑动绑定
items.targetContract: One-to-three-finger directional swipes, taps and configurable long-press use the maintained gesture engine, respect active context and release all pointer work on unmount.
items.notes: Directional swipe, tap and configurable long-press descriptors for one to three fingers are editable and routed through @use-gesture/react outside interactive controls; real-device E2E remains pending.

items.title: 鼠标轨迹手势
items.targetContract: Recorded direction sequences match with a bounded gesture engine and visual preview.
items.notes: @use-gesture owns drag lifecycle while a shared pure quantizer emits at most 16 non-repeating direction segments. The Card supports button, instant/hold trigger, timing, sequence editing and live directional recording preview; real Chromium trajectory evidence remains pending.

items.title: 标准手柄按钮绑定
items.targetContract: XR adds standard Gamepad buttons through a maintained listener, starts polling only when an enabled gamepad binding exists and routes through the same action/context map.
items.notes: gamepad.js owns runtime and modal button recording; connection state and Chromium gamepad injection remain pending. This is an XR extension, not legacy parity.

items.title: 径向菜单配置与运行时
items.targetContract: Menu definitions, slots, trigger binding, hold/toggle mode and hit testing share the action registry and canonical persistence.
items.notes: All 13 ray-menu TypeScript files are copied byte-for-byte from source revision a4c4e074. React lazily adapts the original NeoViewRayMenu overlay and a complete settings editor covers enablement, menus, three layers, recursive slots, actions/cross-menu jumps, ordering, geometry, preview, reset and independent persistence. Right-button press, one-finger long-press and Enter hold open it; pointer/touch Chromium geometry and legacy toggle-mode evidence remain pending.

items.title: 冲突检测、禁用与删除
items.targetContract: Enabled bindings with the same normalized input in one context are blocked; disabled collisions remain editable and every row can be enabled, disabled or deleted.
items.notes: Pure domain, backend validation and GUI share the same normalized conflict key.

items.title: 交互式输入录制
items.targetContract: Keyboard, pointer, touch and gamepad recorders capture one bounded input with cancel/clear and no action leakage.
items.notes: react-hotkeys-hook records keyboard chords with IME isolation; @use-gesture/react records pointer, wheel, touch and bounded mouse trajectories with live direction preview; gamepad.js records standard buttons. Real touch and virtual-gamepad Chromium evidence remain pending.

items.title: 严格有界多设备 DTO
items.targetContract: A versioned bounded DTO accepts only known actions, contexts and device descriptors, rejects executable fields, duplicate IDs and ambiguous enabled bindings.
items.notes: The canonical DTO is browser-safe, capped at 256 entries and shared by runtime config and HTTP. Multiple records may share one action, preserving the legacy one-operation-to-many-inputs contract across devices and contexts; key-down and bounded key-hold are distinct descriptors.

items.title: 写入唯一 TOML 规范
items.targetContract: Runtime writes only [nodes.neoview.bindings].items through the atomic config store and restores defaults with one command.
items.notes: GUI HTTP persists canonical items atomically, and the real settings-import CLI round-trips multiple bindings plus radial menus through xiranite.config.toml and the production runtime parser. Explicit CLI/TUI inspect, edit and dispatch commands remain pending.

items.title: 一次性导入旧绑定与径向菜单
items.targetContract: Legacy appSettings.keybindings/radialMenus and bindings.keybindings/radial_menus import once with a report and never remain a second runtime store.
items.notes: The canonical settings-import transaction converts appSettings and raw localStorage sources for keybindings and radial menus, expands every legacy bindings/contextBindings entry into independent XR records, preserves ambiguous records as disabled, maps global/viewer/videoPlayer contexts and all supported devices, converts menus/layers/recursive slots/cross-menu jumps and legacy action IDs, reports every downgrade, and atomically round-trips through production TOML. A GUI/TUI import projection remains pending.

items.title: 搜索、空、冲突、保存与错误状态
items.targetContract: The editor exposes search/filter, empty, enabled/disabled, conflict, saving, success, failure and reset states without replacing the confirmed runtime configuration on failure.
items.notes: Core states and real PATCH success are covered in Chromium; interactive recording states and failed HTTP rollback E2E remain pending.

items.title: 输入保护与无障碍等价操作
items.targetContract: Every row/control is named and keyboard operable; editor, IME and recording contexts suppress Reader actions; touch/mouse-only operations have accessible equivalents.
items.notes: Native controls and DOM context suppression are covered; focus restoration, recorder capture and screen-reader E2E remain pending.

items.title: 按需监听并完整释放
items.targetContract: One keyboard listener and one gesture route are stable; gamepad polling exists only with enabled bindings and all listener/gesture/recording work stops on unmount or hidden document.
items.notes: Framework adapters clean up on unmount, keyboard hold timers cancel on key-up/blur/config replacement, the copied ray-menu removes its global listeners on close, and gamepad is conditionally loaded; focused listener-count and visibility E2E remain pending.

items.title: 延迟设置 Card 与旧层级
items.targetContract: Operations Binding remains a deferred Settings Card with the legacy search/filter/list hierarchy and no Reader-entry editor code.
items.notes: The Card is registered under Settings > Operations Binding, preserves the search/filter/list hierarchy and ships as a 7.6 KiB second-level deferred production chunk.

items.title: 保持紧凑绑定表与响应式布局
items.targetContract: Search, context filter, action/context/device editors, enable switch, conflict state and commands remain scan-friendly at desktop and 420x360.
items.notes: Desktop and 420x360 Chromium cover editing, saving, immediate runtime replacement and zero horizontal overflow with captured screenshots.

items.title: 稳定监听、条件手柄轮询与独立 chunk
items.targetContract: Runtime adapters do not rerender Reader on raw input, settings editor is deferred, gamepad polling is conditional and explicit chunk/listener latency budgets pass.
items.notes: Ref-backed adapters avoid raw-input state updates; the 7.6 KiB editor, 29.1 KiB gesture runtime and 10.4 KiB conditional gamepad runtime are independent production chunks. Listener-count and input-dispatch latency benchmarks remain pending.

items.title: 记录框架替代与手柄扩展
items.targetContract: Document react-hotkeys-hook, @use-gesture/react and gamepad.js as maintained replacements for legacy custom listeners, and gamepad as an XR extension without removing legacy devices.
items.notes: The runtime delegates recognition to mature libraries; project code owns only action/context DTOs, persistence and conflict keys.
